name: Explosives/landmine sensor (YqjF + CRISPRa)
shortDescription: Detects buried explosives by sensing DNT vapour (a TNT degradation product that leaks from landmines). The YqjF sensor gates a CRISPRa circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in safe E. coli K-12.

input.detects: DNT vapour leaking from buried explosives / landmines in soil
input.operatingRange: Engineered YqjF reporters detect ppb-level DNT

sensing.sensorMechanism: The yqjF promoter (PyqjF) is induced by DNT degradation products; its regulator de-represses on exposure.
sensing.signalFlow: DNT -> PyqjF activates -> transcribes an sgRNA -> dCas9-activator amplifies a fluorescent reporter (CRISPRa) -> fluorescence over buried explosives.

parts.name: YqjF sensing module + PyqjF
parts.source: E. coli yqjF locus; engineered as a DNT biosensor (Belkin lab)
parts.notes: DNT-responsive promoter used in landmine-detection biosensors.

parts.name: Reporter-activating sgRNA
parts.source: designed for CRISPRa upstream of a weak reporter promoter

parts.name: sfGFP
parts.notes: Cells embedded in beads scattered over a minefield, scanned by laser/drone.

performance.limitOfDetection: Engineered YqjF reporters: ppb DNT (module-validated, Belkin lab field tests).
performance.notes: The YqjF DNT biosensor is field-validated for landmine detection; the CRISPRa amplifier integration is a design template to boost the signal.

safety.biocontainment: Encapsulate cells in hydrogel beads; pair with a kill-switch for outdoor use.
safety.notes: E. coli K-12 non-pathogenic BSL-1 host; a humanitarian demining application.

buildSteps.title: Design CRISPRa sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target a weak reporter promoter; check host off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: PyqjF -> sgRNA. TU2: dCas9-omega. TU3: weak promoter -> sfGFP.

buildSteps.title: Deploy/expose
buildSteps.description: Encapsulate; expose to soil headspace + DNT standard.

provenance.source: Design template combining the YqjF DNT/landmine biosensor with E. coli CRISPRa
partsSources: Belkin et al. 2017, Nat. Biotechnol. (microbial landmine detection, yqjF)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
